The '''Pharine River''' was a river on [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]] that formed a rough border for the sprawling capital city of [[Phemiss]]. The river flowed into the [[Tsilor Sea]].<ref name="CatCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>
